theme_description: Default theme for the standalone Class Creation Wizard. Self-contained (theme_base empty) so the tool renders identically with no engine present. Values mirror the O3DE_Original editor theme's ClassWizard group so the standalone baseline matches the editor's default theme. Format matches the O3DE editor theming system (AzQtComponents/Themes/<Name>/themeProperties.json) so the editor StyleManager / Theme Editor can read and author it. Engine themes override these via their own ClassWizard block.
